name: get_zone_away_configuration
description: Retrieves the away mode configuration for a specific heating zone, including settings for when the home is unoccupied such as away temperature setpoints, early start behavior, and other absence-related climate control preferences. Returns the configured away mode parameters to display to users or use for scheduling decisions.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/installation

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone
